title: SSL Format Converter
description: Convert certificate bundles and keys across PFX, JKS, PEM, and PKCS8 with downloadable outputs.

fields.sourceFileHelp: For PFX / JKS, uploading the keystore file is usually the most reliable path.
fields.keyFileHelp: Upload a PEM / KEY / PKCS8 text private key file, or paste the key content directly.

placeholders.bundleContent: Paste a certificate chain or PEM bundle that contains certificate and key...
placeholders.keyContent: If the key is separate from the certificate, paste it here...
placeholders.password: Leave empty to keep default behavior

notes.title: Conversion note
notes.description: JKS / PFX conversions typically require a private-key entry in the source keystore. A truststore alone cannot produce a PKCS8 or PEM private key.

states.binaryReady: This output is binary and ready to download.

empty.title: Choose source and target formats to start
empty.description: The default flow stays simple, while passwords, alias, and extra key input can be provided only when needed.

errors.title: Conversion failed
errors.requestFailed: Certificate conversion failed. Please verify passwords, key material, and input content.
